name: Golden Queen
personality: As her name suggests, the Golden Queen completely values solid gold of any kind. She was extremely greedy, never having enough gold until all of it in the world of Skylands was hers. In her attempt to satisfy her desire for more gold, she would turn objects and people into gold. As the former leader of the Doom Raiders, she had a feared, yet respected position among her allies. The Golden Queen however, can be easily angered (which causes her to glow brightly) if things don't turn out the way they were planned, and she didn't tolerate failure. Despite having recruited the Doom Raiders, she showed no concern when several of them were captured as long as their roles in helping to complete the  Ultimate Weapon  were fulfilled.  The Golden Queen firmly believed that gold surpasses everything, including friendship. When she turned Cali to gold, she claimed that the frozen Mabu was something more precious to her than just a friend to the Skylanders. On one occasion, she became aggressive and reckless when a golden egg was stolen from her in Graduation Day , and turning down the opportunity of ruling Skylands if it meant having all the gold in the world instead. In her Meet the Villains trailer, she mentions having been "fed with a silver spoon, but [she] didn't want silver, [she] wanted gold!", implying that the Golden Queen was always spoiled even from a young age. After her rehabilitation, the Golden Queen lost much of her obsession with gold, but kept her aggressive and prideful personality even in the side of the heroes. She has also discarded her villainous side completely, as she now values the newfound friendship and companionship among her new Skylander teammates.
